narrative:
Alessandro Circati is a robust Centre-Back for Australia, earning an overall rating of 7.38/10. This impressive score places him in the top 1% of all centre-backs competing at this tournament. A significant 33% of this rating comes directly from his performances at this World Cup.

Circati demonstrates strong defensive work, registering 2.667 tackles and 4.667 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He also shows an unexpected offensive presence, with 0.177 expected goals and 0.667 shots per 90 minutes. However, his very low 0.007 expected assists per 90 minutes suggests he is not a primary creative outlet.
